entries.current_position: RP-C06 is IN_PROGRESS with seven explicit UNPROVEN missions. RP-C05 fresh-clone Sunrise reconstructed this gate. Its former G4-E construction and G4-F live-acceptance meanings are bound without activation. RP-C02 through RP-C05 remain accepted; unresolved RP-C01 missions remain explicit blockers and are not promoted.
blockers: RP-C01-M02 fresh Work/Athena-native Phoenix Blade control is unproven.
RP-C01-M05 Arrow/Spear byte and receipt parity is not proven end to end.
RP-C01-M06 protected-path handoff detection is proven, but protected execution was not run.
RP-C01-M07 the live rejection matrix is partial; the full fail-closed fallback set is unproven.
RP-C01-M08 routine Jayson carrier dependency retirement is unproven.
entries.next_action: Add the separate GENERATED_CHECKPOINT_V1 singular-Thread-Engine construction profile and read-only hosted package preparer from exact current main; do not reuse closed PR #127.
